headline: Teledyne Expands Maritime And Drone Offerings As Valuation Questions Linger
summary: Teledyne Technologies (NYSE:TDY) has combined ChartWorld and Raymarine Commercial into a single commercial navigation brand. The new brand aims to offer integrated maritime navigation solutions aligned with industry changes such as the S-100 data model. Separately, Teledyne FLIR OEM has released Prism C-UAS software focused on advanced small drone detection using AI and multispectral sensing. For investors watching NYSE:TDY, these moves come with the stock at a share price of $630.78 and...
